data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Verified commit 1a591cd2 removes prompt-guidance diagnostics and fix paths from src/lib/doctor.ts, leaves no AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md prompt-file handling in doctor, and updates the three doctor test suites accordingly. Re-ran doctor-focused verification in the review worktree: bun test src/lib/__tests__/doctor.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/doctor-coverage.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/doctor-applyfix.test.ts (83 passing) and bunx tsc --noEmit (pass). bun run lint completed with existing unrelated repository warnings only; no blocking findings for this knot.
